title: Maintenance Workers, Machinery
description: Lubricate machinery, change parts, or perform other routine machinery maintenance.

tasks.text: Dismantle machines and remove parts for repair, using hand tools, chain falls, jacks, cranes, or hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reassemble machines after the completion of repair or maintenance work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record production, repair, and machine maintenance information.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Lubricate or apply adhesives or other materials to machines, machine parts, or other equipment according to specified procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, replace, or change machine parts and attachments, according to production specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and operate machines, and adjust controls to regulate operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other workers to repair or move machines, machine parts, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read work orders and specifications to determine machines and equipment requiring repair or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect or test damaged machine parts, and mark defective areas or advise supervisors of repair needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start machines and observe mechanical operation to determine efficiency and to detect problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport machine parts, tools, equipment, and other material between work areas and storage, using cranes, hoists, or dollies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and discard worn machine parts and other refuse to maintain machinery and work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inventory and requisition machine parts, equipment, and other supplies so that stock can be maintained and replenished.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove hardened material from machines or machine parts, using abrasives, power and hand tools, jackhammers, sledgehammers, or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace, empty, or replenish machine and equipment containers such as gas tanks or boxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean machines and machine parts, using cleaning solvents, cloths, air guns, hoses, vacuums, or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace or repair metal, wood, leather, glass, or other lining in machines, or in equipment compartments or containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure, mix, prepare, and test chemical solutions used to clean or repair machinery and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
